text: I feel a sense of curiosity and mild disorientation. The glass rooms, the children in vests, the carefully designed wall displays—these elements place me within a space dedicated to education or innovation, perhaps a museum or research center. The text on the wall about confusion and blurred reality resonates with my own perception; I am in the midst of learning, observing, and participating in a communal search for meaning. It is both reassuring and destabilizing, this invitation to embrace uncertainty as a condition of discovery.
